title: UI fixes: reposition buttons/popups, restore 3D/2D toggles, remove bottom-left time

requirements.text: Move the 'World Travel', 'Time Zone', and 'Global Control' buttons back to the upper-left area of the map/globe explorer UI (LocationMapExplorer.tsx), restoring their original positioning from version 1164.

quotes: moved the buttons World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control back to the upper left

acceptanceCriteria: The World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control buttons are visually positioned in the upper-left corner of the explorer page.
No other UI elements are repositioned or removed as a side effect.

requirements.text: When clicking the 'World Travel', 'Time Zone', or 'Global Control' buttons, the popup/panel that appears must open on the right side of the screen instead of the left side.

quotes: when clicking the buttons World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control, the pop up box appear at the right (now the pop up box is at the left)

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'World Travel' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Clicking 'Time Zone' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Clicking 'Global Control' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Popups do not overlap the upper-left button group.

requirements.text: Restore the 3D and 2D toggle buttons in LocationMapExplorer.tsx that were present in version 1164 but are currently missing. Re-add them in their original location and with their original functionality for switching between 3D globe and 2D map views.

quotes: the 3d and 2d button is gone, retrieve them back

acceptanceCriteria: A 3D toggle button and a 2D toggle button are visible in the UI.
Clicking '3D' switches the view to the 3D interactive globe.
Clicking '2D' switches the view to the 2D map.
The active view mode is visually indicated on the toggle buttons.

requirements.text: Remove the local time display that is currently shown in the bottom-left area of the explorer UI (LocationMapExplorer.tsx).

quotes: do not need the time displayed at the bottom left, remove it

acceptanceCriteria: No time or clock element is rendered in the bottom-left corner of the explorer page.
The removal does not affect any other UI elements or layout.

constraints: Do not alter the overall UI layout, visual theme, or any components outside the four targeted areas.
All changes must be limited to LocationMapExplorer.tsx and any directly related panel/popup positioning styles.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design, color scheme, or typography.
Modifying the InteractiveGlobe, MapComponent, or any panel component's internal logic.
Any backend schema or data changes.
